edge: Stable prediction aims to address the instability of predictions in traditional GNNs due to distribution shifts between training and testing.
The focus is on achieving high average performance and low performance variance (stability) in GNNs to handle non-IID testing graphs.
The key to stable prediction lies in identifying properties that remain consistently important despite distribution shifts.
A proposed solution to improve stability in GNNs through a framework that performs biased selection and trains multiple predictors for different distribution shifts.
